name: HGE Edge Data Acquisition Computer
desc: Edge data acquisition computer with edge computing, 4G uplink, RS485/M-Bus/analog downlink, IP68, 38,000 mAh battery, 6-year operational life.
overview: The HGI Edge Data Acquisition Computer provides edge computing capability for community, building and agricultural IoT deployments. Local filtering, feature extraction, anomaly detection and real-time logic processing eliminates the need to transmit raw data to the cloud. Supports M-Bus, RS485 and analog 4-20mA inputs. Battery life up to 10 years. IP68 rated for all-weather installation.

specs.label: Extended sensors
specs.value: Temperature, humidity, pressure, level, CH₄, H₂S, CO

features: Edge computing: data processed locally — end-to-end latency 10~50 ms, no cloud round-trip needed
Supports diverse sensors: temperature, humidity, pressure, liquid level, CH₄, H₂S, CO for comprehensive monitoring
Ultra-low standby current <2 µA — Lithium battery life up to 10 years
Flexible communication: 4G uplink; RS485 / M-Bus / 4-20mA analogue downlink
Compact 194×135×50mm wall-mount enclosure — deploys in any tight space without complex wiring
IP68 and EMI-resistant — durable in harsh outdoor and underground environments
